title: Limbdi Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Limbdi with a Z-Score of +6.91. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current conditions in Limbdi are extremely hot, with a high temperature anomaly. 
 The relative humidity is at 21%, and the wind speed is 16.7 km/h, which is not providing any relief. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 23.2 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
